summary: Adjusted the opening to avoid mirroring Chapter 10's visible time-fronted scaffold and added one brief cue that Martha and Owen's prior-chapter rupture is still active beneath the task exchange.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin from Owen's bodily experience of the cold rather than a 'By February' temporal lead-in.
Added a single sentence after Martha asks for Owen's help to keep the unresolved Chapter 8 tension legible without changing scene beats.
